title: strategy_004_gaussian_channel_trend_pullback
thesis_bullets: STRATEGY: Gaussian Channel Trend Pullback (Approximation) ASSET: BTC, ETH TIMEFRAME: 4h (primary), also test on 1h MARKET CONDITION: Established trends with healthy pullbacks TYPE: Trend pullback (buy the dip / sell the rip) CONCEPT: Inspired by Gaussian channel strategies that perform well on BTC.
A Gaussian channel is essentially a heavily smoothed moving average with deviation bands that identify trend direction and pullback zones.
We approximate this using EMA with Bollinger-style ATR bands.
The key insight is: in a strong trend, pullbacks to the lower channel band are buying opportunities, not reversals.
We combine with Stochastic to time entries precisely when the pullback is exhausted and momentum is turning back.

INDICATORS USED: - EMA 25 - center of the Gaussian channel approximation - ATR (period 14) - channel width (2x ATR above and below EMA 25) - Stochastic (K period 14, D period 3, smooth 3) - pullback exhaustion timing - EMA 50 - trend direction confirmation - EMA 200 - major trend filter - ADX (period 14) - trend strength confirmation CHANNEL CONSTRUCTION: - Upper channel: EMA(25) + 2.0 * ATR(14) -
Channel slope is up (EMA 25 rising over last 5 bars) 2.
Price pulls back to lower half of channel (below EMA 25 but above lower channel) 4.
Stochastic K crosses above D from below 20 (pullback exhausted, momentum returning) 5.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 4h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 4h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
